title: autobench.improver.divergence v1
description: Per-iteration divergence between the LLM-proposed harness mutation and what the rule-based heuristic would have proposed for the same input. The antagonist's surprise detector. Source: /autobench.

llm_delta.description: ImprovementDelta proposed by the active improver (LLM or rule-based).

heuristic_delta.description: ImprovementDelta the rule-based heuristic would have proposed for the same input.

divergent.description: True iff llm_delta and heuristic_delta disagree on any non-trivial field.

divergence_summary.description: Human-readable diff between the two deltas.
